pr.title: Two-Level Dirichlet Posterior + Phrase Cache — 0.11556 BPB (3-seed)

output.summary: Mixes EBLS neural base with two-level Dirichlet/posterior n-gram plus phrase-cache smoothing before GPTQ+LZMA compression.
techniques: Two-level Dirichlet-Multinomial smoothing blending neural, n-gram, and phrase sources
Per-order OBCL concentrations with phrase-cache probes to regulate high-order n-grams
EBLS backbone with GPTQ int6 quantization plus LZMA compression
